title: I Forgot
lyrics:
[opening]
Mama, mama, mama, mama!
What?
Papa, papa, papa, papa!
What NOW?
Mama, papa, mama, papa!
WHAT?!
I forgot!

[verse]
The homework's in the dog, he ate the lot!
I didn't take the cookie—okay, maybe I got.
There's mud on the rug, it's a really bad spot.
I swear I cleaned my room, well maybe not. *what?*

[chorus]
I forgot! I forgot!
It's not my fault—nope, not a dot!
I forgot! I forgot!
So why you yellin'? I forgot!

[verse]
I left the milk out and now it's hot.
My room's a disaster but that's not my plot. *really?*
I had the remote but now I ain't got.
The trash smells like something starting to rot.

[chorus]
I forgot! I forgot!
It's not my fault—nope, not a plot!
I forgot! I forgot!
So why you sighin'? I forgot!

[verse]
I boiled my crayons in Mom's cooking pot. *burp*
I slept in my clothes on my brother's cot.
My shoelaces are tied in a knot.
I spilled the juice—it was my best shot!

[chorus]
I forgot! I forgot!
It's not my fault—hey, look, a spot!
I forgot... I forgot...
*yawn* Maybe I'll clean... *snore* zzzzzzz.
style_prompt: Catchy bouncy song, acoustic guitar, punchy pop beat, 115 BPM, boppy bass, snappy snare, groovy confident, slightly sarcastic, dramatic comedy pauses, cool not babyish, undeniable bounce
cover_description: A child standing at the school door with a giant backpack but missing one shoe, homework papers trailing behind like a bread crumb trail, a goldfish bowl balanced on their head, chaos energy
rhyme_family: hot, lot, spot, not, dot, got, rot, pot, cot, knot, shot, tot, squat, plot, blot, yacht, caught, thought, ought, bot
